data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of issuing a certificate upon completion with an 80% attendance threshold. However, the evidence does not confirm that a certificate is generated or that the attendance tracking is properly implemented to support this requirement. The linked use case mentions that Sarah completed the course with 80% attendance, but there is no explicit evidence of a certificate being issued, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a certificate being issued upon completion of the course.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for certificate issuance
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a certificate is issued when the attendance requirement is met.
